rationale: Fluid dynamics (interfacial/Hele-Shaw flow) is a genuinely different field from differential geometry, so field_match fails. The stated mechanism is the dispersionless-Toda-hierarchy tau-function with conformal maps and exterior harmonic moments, whereas the reference is a twistor-type correspondence linearizing an integrable equation via rational curves of prescribed normal bundle on an auxiliary complex manifold; both merely share the general theme of integrability/Lax structure but denote distinct specific machinery, so mechanism_match fails and the answer is not equivalent.
